description: A self-hosted network monitoring dashboard that runs real Ookla speedtests on a schedule, pings continuously to track uptime, and shows the history as graphs you can actually reflect on — not just a live number that resets every refresh.
author: BigBearTechWorld

tips.before_install: NetPulse runs on host networking and binds port 8077 directly on your server. Change the default NETPULSE_PASSWORD — it protects the dashboard login (default username is admin). Speedtests run every 10 minutes by default; adjust SPEEDTEST_INTERVAL_MIN if that's too frequent.

title: NetPulse
